description: A screenshot of a long multi-paragraph social-media post from an account labeled 'Donald J. Trump' with the handle '@realDonaldTrump'. The black-on-white text discusses extending FISA 702 through the House, references the House Speaker and committee chairmen, the author's claims about past FISA abuse, the FBI, and military operations, signed 'President DONALD J. TRUMP'.
notable_text: Donald J. Trump; @realDonaldTrump; to get a clean extension of FISA 702 through the House of Representatives
